final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; skyline as primary horizontal subject
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights gradually brightening, hurrying pedestrians in foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk setting — neon-lit street level below, high-rise skyline above, golden sunset reflected on glass towers
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic dusk atmosphere with high contrast between warm sunset glow and cool neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of warm golden-orange sunset against cool neon blues and purples — exact ratios and values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution texture with fine detail — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary title, bold modern typeface, prominent placement); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle, secondary size); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; must leave sufficient clear areas for text overlay; all three text elements must be legible and placed as described
Avoid:
